name: PDF Document Reader
description: Upload any PDF document (line sheets, spec sheets, supplier docs) and the agent will read and extract relevant product data using Claude Vision.
actions: Accept PDF upload via chat or file upload
Analyze PDF pages using Claude Vision
Extract structured data based on document type
Merge extracted data with existing job data (configurable priority)
example_requests: Can you read this line sheet?
I have a supplier spec sheet with fabric details
Upload a PDF with care instruction data
What data can you extract from this document?
